name: Tabs
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Tabs wrapper composed from the local Base UI Tabs primitive, shadcn root/list/trigger/content slots, local class canonicalization, and pure list variant classes.

registry.reason: shadcn Tabs composes the local Base UI Tabs primitive.
shadcn Tabs uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema options for the wrapper.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Tabs implementation.
CVA variant handling is replaced with a local Effect Schema literal and pure class helper.
Origin icon examples are rendered as fixture-only evidence; installable source does not import React icon packages.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin RTL example dependency is fixture evidence only and replaced by local deterministic RTL example data.
Card is not present in this registry yet; Tabs examples use local static card markup instead of declaring an unavailable registry dependency.

examples.description: Default Tabs demo with local static card markup.
examples.distinguishes: Default Tabs demo with local static card markup.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Tabs attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages. The wrapper preserves shadcn slots, classes, and variants over the local Foldkit primitive.

deviations.summary: Examples use local static card, icon, and RTL data instead of unavailable origin app dependencies.
deviations.rationale: Card and language selector are outside this component slice. Static local markup preserves the relevant Tabs DOM, class, ARIA, and visual contracts without adding unavailable registry dependencies.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Tabs wrapper composed from the local Base UI Tabs primitive, shadcn root/list/trigger/content slots, local class canonicalization, and pure list variant classes.
